expected_effect: Improve normal-condition volume capture while preserving or strengthening protection during true burst events, lifting screen mean edge on the current anchor-based strategy.
rationale: External fee studies point to stable normal-condition fees with much higher protection only in very high-volatility states. The current strategy may still overcharge moderate observation shocks while underreacting to true bursts. Replace the linear observation carry with a lower base event charge and a steeper surcharge only above a shock threshold.
title: Threshold event surcharge
